TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Maribasi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 365 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 335 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 30 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 65%, Amis 4%, Tayan 10%, Setik 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maribasi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maribasi hya' ga Murisaka. tay mkyahu' na Maribasi hya' ga Thgahan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mariβas~ɕi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa muris~ɕaka. taj mkjaħuʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa tħɣaħan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Maribasi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 104 buwan, 365 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 335 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 30 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 65%, Amis 4%, Tayan 10%, Setik 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Maribasi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maribasi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Maribasi hya' ga Murisaka. tay mkyahu' na Maribasi hya' ga Thgahan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mariβas~ɕi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa muris~ɕaka. taj mkjaħuʔ na mariβas~ɕi ħjaʔ ɣa tħɣaħan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
